query: any(i in labels for i in ['unsubscribe', 'ai/otp', 'ai/transaction', 'ai/investment', 'ai/order', 'ai/subscription', 'ai/newsletter', 'ai/promotional', 'ai/social', 'ai/delivery', 'ai/cc-statements', 'ai/non-cc-statements'])
timediff > day and any(i in labels for i in ['ai/transaction'])
timediff > month and any(i in labels for i in ['ai/delivery', 'ai/order'])
timediff > day and any(i in labels for i in ['ai/otp'])
timediff > day and any(i in labels for i in ['unsubscribe', 'ai/promotional', 'ai/social', 'ai/newsletter'])
